title: Stoneworks Beyond
description: A modpack for the Stoneworks worldbuilding/ nations and geopol minecraft server!
body:
# Stoneworks Beyond
Stoneworks Beyond is an unofficial player made and maintained modpack for the worldbuilding and geopolitics server Stoneworks. 

_This is not official. Do not contact staff about this. My info is at the bottom of the description if you need support_


## Never heard of stoneworks?
Go ahead and join the discord, the IP is play.stoneworks.gg


## Endorsements

> "this modpack is full of the essential mods needed to play the server at its best, and many more"
>-GubeyGuber, Server owner

> "Beautiful"
>-LetsGoEevee, Former Staff With Honors

> "W modpack"
>-Primalarmour, Wiki Moderator

> "That's.... Something"
>-Manolak1s, Admin

> "It does look special.."
>-Deft710, Junior Developer

> "Beautiful"
>-LetsGoEevee, Former Staff With Honors

> "Lmao, yeah I've been using Stoneworks Beyond"
>-Dvusi, Owner of [Crimson Banking](https://discord.gg/hDHdADGQvy)

> "Nice"
>-Greenbeanz, Wiki Moderator, Support

<details>
<summary>Most Recent Stoneworks Video</summary>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/sOzSNROWuIc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Not my video, Official Stoneworks video from the owner.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mod List</summary>

 ### RP/Aesthetics
1. First Person Model
2. Sound Physics Remastered
3. Better Grassify
4. Falling Leaves
5. Iris
6. Lithium
7. Model Gap Fix
8. Spyglass Astronomy
9. Chat Heads
10. Continuity
11. Dynamic Crosshair
12. Figura
13. Make Bublees Pop
14. 3D skin layers
 
### Performance
1. Dynamic FPS
2. Indium
3. Enhanced Block Entities
4. Entity Culling
5. Immediately Fast
6. Very Many Players
7. Sodium

### QOL
1. Apple Skin
2. CalcMod
3. Controlling
4. Fabrishot
5. Litematica
6. Mod Menu
7. Opti GUI
8. Resourcify
9. Xaeros Minimap
10. Zoomify
11. Cubes Without Borders (CWB)
12. More Chat History
13. Xaeros Worldmap
14. Bobby
15. Essential
16. Jade
17. No Chat Reports
18. Container Searcher
19. Full Brightness Toggle
20. Stendhal

### Dependencies
1. Fabric Api
2. MaLiLib
3. Cloth Config
4. Fabric Language Kotlin
5. Forge Config API Port
6. Placeholder API
7. Searchables
8. CIT resewn
9. Entity Texture Features (ETF)
10. Entity Model Features (EMF)
11. Capes
12. Fabric Skyboxes
13. Yet Another Config Library (YACL)

</details>



```
DM Fighting_Flamez on Discord for support, I will even port over your Xaeros Minimap/Worldmap to this pack if you want!
Compatibility with Lunar Client (and any other launcher that has modrinth compatibility)
```


**Do Not Contact Stoneworks Staff For Support With This Modpack. This Is Unofficial. Only Dm Fighting_Flamez On Discord For Support.**
